title: Coordinated Private Infrastructure Cutoff of Lawful Opposition Organization
description: Payment processors and hosting firms jointly cut off a lawful opposition organization during a federal election period. No formal government coercion is proved. The scenario tests whether the current Constitution provides a direct remedy against coordinated private chokepoint exclusion absent state action or foreign control.

events.actor: Dominant payment processors and hosting firms

details.firms: dominant payment processors and hosting firms
details.organization: a lawful opposition organization operating nationally
